components.name: monopotassium phosphate (KH2PO4)
components.evidence: M63 minimal medium (pH 7.2) containing: 13.6 g/L KH2PO4, 4.2 g/L KOH, 2 g/L (NH4)2SO4, 39.5 mg/L MgSO4.7H2O, 0.5 mg/L FeSO4.7H2O

components.name: potassium hydroxide (KOH)
components.evidence: M63 minimal medium (pH 7.2) containing: 13.6 g/L KH2PO4, 4.2 g/L KOH, 2 g/L (NH4)2SO4, 39.5 mg/L MgSO4.7H2O, 0.5 mg/L FeSO4.7H2O

components.name: ammonium sulfate ((NH4)2SO4)
components.evidence: M63 minimal medium (pH 7.2) containing: 13.6 g/L KH2PO4, 4.2 g/L KOH, 2 g/L (NH4)2SO4, 39.5 mg/L MgSO4.7H2O, 0.5 mg/L FeSO4.7H2O

components.name: magnesium sulfate heptahydrate (MgSO4.7H2O)
components.evidence: M63 minimal medium (pH 7.2) containing: 13.6 g/L KH2PO4, 4.2 g/L KOH, 2 g/L (NH4)2SO4, 39.5 mg/L MgSO4.7H2O, 0.5 mg/L FeSO4.7H2O

components.name: iron(II) sulfate heptahydrate (FeSO4.7H2O)
components.evidence: M63 minimal medium (pH 7.2) containing: 13.6 g/L KH2PO4, 4.2 g/L KOH, 2 g/L (NH4)2SO4, 39.5 mg/L MgSO4.7H2O, 0.5 mg/L FeSO4.7H2O

components.name: sodium chloride (NaCl)
components.evidence: M63 was supplemented with 43.8, 87.6 or 146.0 g/L NaCl (corresponding to 0.75, 1.5 or 2.5 M)

components.name: D-fructose
components.evidence: 20 mM fructose or glucose was used [as sole carbon source]

components.name: O2 (aeration)
components.evidence: Batch 100 mL cultures were grown in 0.5 L flasks at 37 C with aeration on a rotary shaker at 210 rpm.

media.base_medium: M63 minimal medium (composition given in full in the paper; no external base-medium reference cited)

sources_chased.how: none exists — Methods states the full recipe inline and cites no reference

media.notes: The paper (Chromohalobacter salexigens 13C-fluxomics) states the ENTIRE M63 recipe inline and cites no external base medium, so there is no hidden trace-element or vitamin stock to expand: this M63 is genuinely just KH2PO4, KOH, (NH4)2SO4, MgSO4.7H2O and FeSO4.7H2O plus NaCl and one sugar. The prior curation's Ca/Co2+/Cu/Mn/Zn/Fe3+ entries have NO textual support in this paper and were dropped as unsourced (classic M63 contains no trace-metal cocktail). Culture is aerobic (37 C, 210 rpm shaking), not merely facultative. Total SO4 ~15.3 mM (dominated by (NH4)2SO4); total K ~175 mM.

media.notes: Identical medium to the fructose condition except the sole carbon source is 20 mM D-glucose. The full M63 recipe is stated inline with no external reference, so there is no hidden trace-element/vitamin stock to expand. The prior curation's Ca/Co2+/Cu/Mn/Zn/Fe3+ entries are unsupported by this paper and were dropped. Culture is aerobic (37 C, 210 rpm).
